caption:
Most owners run their leads out of a notebook, a spreadsheet, or their memory.

Black Arrow OS replaces all three, for free.

Drag every lead through a visual pipeline from new to quoted to won.

Set the next follow-up date so nobody goes quiet on you.

Check a weekly dashboard for cost per lead and return on ad spend.

Export the whole thing to CSV whenever you want your data.

No signup, no card, 25 contacts to start.

DM TOOLS
#ServiceBusiness #CRM #SmallBusinessTools #HomeServices #LeadManagement
rationale: Solo-features Black Arrow OS with verified, on-site specs (pipeline, follow-ups, KPI dashboard, CSV export, $0/25 contacts). No third-party or performance claims made; all statements describe the tool's own functionality.
